author: ayush
text: /question what happens when the milk overflows
aiReply: Ah, the mystical overflow of milk, or 'doodh ubalna', is indeed a most auspicious sign. It signals the imminent arrival of Goddess Lakshmi, deity of wealth, bringing an abundance of prosperity, happiness, and good fortune to your home. This sacred event represents a purification and a sweet new beginning, an overflow of blessings.
